key_points: nth term formula is used to find any term or its position in an AP
Common difference decides the nature of AP
APs model situations involving constant increase or decrease
Graph of an AP forms a straight line
Complex word problems require identifying a, d and n correctly
examples: Finding position of a term using nth term formula
Salary increasing by fixed amount follows AP
Negative common difference gives decreasing AP
exam_tips: Always identify first term and common difference carefully
Position-based AP questions are common in exams
Translate word problems into AP format before solving
Check sign of d to avoid conceptual errors
